e2_sentence: No doubt, I would have killed them, for  the Prophet said, 'If somebody (a Muslim) discards his religion, kill him.'

e1_sentence: Ali burnt some people and this news reached Ibn 'Abbas, who said, "Had I been  in his place I would not have burnt them, as the Prophet said, 'Don't punish  (anybody) with Allah's Punishment.
